ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #6, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-11-2007 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Seth Skootsky appearing for Christina Diver (Trustee). The Court questioned counsel as to why the equalizing payments are not done. Counsel stated that this would be done upon entry of order. The court is approving this accounting as the 6th account, not the final account. The Court instructed counsel to file a final account and final distribution on the reserve. No fees are to be paid from the reserve without court order. Mr. Skootsky stated that the trustee had not made any decision as to payment to Ms. Harper. Ms. Mary Harper was in court and stated her wishes to receive payment for her services. The court informed Ms. Harper that no decision would be made regarding this matter. If she could not work it out with the Trustee, the Trustee or Ms. Harper can file a petition. The court instructed counsel to prepare a revised order approving the 6th account. The Court is not setting any status date.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Janet Pond CSR#5292. Bailiff: A. Aguerre. Clerk: Rosie Noguera

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #6, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #5, REPORT
Off Calendar Nov-28-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Stephen Barbieri appearing for Susan Rush. Seth Skootsky appearing for trustee Christina Diver. Mr. Barbieri asks the Court to defer approval of the 5th account and report until the final account and report is filed. The only thing left for the trustee to do is to sell the house. Ms. Rush wants the Court to direct the trustee to allow her to use the house for one week befor the house is sold. Mr. Skootsky objects to any unsupervise visit to the house. Court is making a ruling on this issue since it is not properly before the court. On attorney's fees, Court wants a detail summary of work that was provided. Matter submitted upon receipt of detail summary. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
